name: Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and sugar in a saucepan over low heat until very hot.
2. Remove from heat and stir in melted chocolate and liquor, ensuring everything is blended well.
3. Chill the mixture for 1 hour or until cool, stirring occasionally.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the chilled mixture onto wax paper-lined trays.
5. Chill again for 30 minutes.
6. Roll each truffle in cornstarch, removing excess with your hands.
7. Coat the finished truffles with melted chocolate and wax (dipping chocolate).
